'''''Amanda's Toy II''''' was a [[Starship/Legends|ship]] owned by [[Unlimited Horizons Inc.]]. It was registered on [[Kalla VII]] with registration number RN18-950319. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] tracked this ship as it passed the inner flight control buoys of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]].

{{Ship-stub}}
